title: Claude Code is the Inflection Point
subtitle: What It Is, How We Use It, Industry Repercussions, Microsoft's Dilemma, Why Anthropic Is Winning
description: What It Is, How We Use It, Industry Repercussions, Microsoft's Dilemma, Why Anthropic Is Winning
truncated_body_text: 4% of GitHub public commits are being authored by Claude Code right now. At the current trajectory, we believe that Claude Code will be 20%+ of all daily commits by the end of 2026. While you blinked, AI consumed all of software development.
